not_started.description: Match is created or reset, waiting to be called.

called.description: Players have been summoned to a station, waiting for both to check in.

in_progress.description: Both players checked in, lobby is active, match is actively being played.

on_stream.label: On-Stream Match Live
on_stream.description: An in_progress match flagged for stream coverage (is_stream_match). Surfaced in the hub's 'On-Stream Match Live' spotlight panel. Derived view of in_progress — not a transition target.

conflict.description: Players reported different scores, waiting for admin resolution.

complete.description: Match is finished, scores verified, results reported to Start.gg.

startgg_linked.description: Player initiated registration and linked their Start.gg profile.

language_selected.description: Player selected preferred language (English or Arabic).

cfn_entered.description: Player entered their CFN (Capcom Fighter Network) ID.

verified.description: Player is fully verified and registration is complete.
